Input.string:
SPECTRES & AG
Nearby allies gain 50% increased damage Nearby allies gain 30% increased damage Nearby allies gain 18% increased damage Nearby enemies take 40% increased physical damage
Input.name: customMods

Input.string:
AG & Spectres
Nearby allies gain 50% increased damage Nearby allies gain 30% increased damage Nearby Allies have +50% to Critical Strike Multiplier You and Nearby Allies have +10 Fortification Nearby enemies take 40% increased physical damage
SPECTRES Pride has no reservation Haste has no reservation Vitality has no reservation
Input.name: customMods

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Rigwald's Hunt General's Brigandine Armour: 1674 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Evasion: 1674 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G-G-G LevelReq: 66 Implicits: 1 {tags:minion,gem}+2 to Level of Socketed Minion Gems {range:1}(160-200)% increased Armour and Evasion {range:1}Minions have (20-30)% increased Movement Speed Minions have 1% chance to deal Double Damage per Fortification on you {range:1}(30-40)% increased Fortification Duration {range:1}Minions have (6-12)% increased Attack Speed Increases and Reductions to Minion Maximum Life also apply to you at 15% of their value Corrupted
